items.title: Binance Earn: Enjoy Up to 8% APR with RLUSD Flexible Products – 10,000 RLUSD Limit Available!
items.participation_condition: Fellow Binancians, Binance Earn is excited to launch a new campaign for the RLUSD Simple Earn Flexible Products !  During the Promotion Period, users who subscribe to RLUSD Flexible Products may enjoy up to 8% APR, which includes an exclusive Bonus Tiered APR on top of Real-Time APR rewards.  How to Participate: Promotion Period: 2026-03-13 00:00:00 (UTC) to 2026-03-26 23:59:59 (UTC) Subscription Format: Complete subscription on a first-come, first-served basis in accordance with the terms below. Users can also deposit RLUSD to their Binance accounts.  Head to [ Simple Earn ], and search for RLUSD .  Select FLEXIBLE, and subscribe to RLUSD Simple Earn Flexible Products to start earning exclusive APR Rewards!
items.reward_summary: Fellow Binancians, Binance Earn is excited to launch a new campaign for the RLUSD Simple Earn Flexible Products !  During the Promotion Period, users who subscribe to RLUSD Flexible Products may enjoy up to 8% APR, which includes an exclusive Bonus Tiered APR on top of Real-Time APR rewards.  How to Participate: Promotion Period: 2026-03-13 00:00:00 (UTC) to 2026-03-26 23:59:59 (UTC) Subscription Format: Complete subscription on a first-come, first-served basis in accordance with the terms below. Rewards Distribution: Bonus Tiered APR: Distributed to users’ Spot Accounts on a daily basis.
reasons: 需要完成指定参与动作
未发现明显大资金门槛
items.low_barrier_reason: 未发现明显大资金门槛

items.title: Velvet Trading Competition: Trade Velvet (VELVET) and Share $200K Worth of Rewards
items.participation_condition: During the Promotion Periods, trade Velvet (VELVET) in your Binance Wallet (Keyless) or via Binance Alpha to receive exclusive token rewards. Any user who is eligible to trade Binance Alpha tokens is eligible to participate in this trading competition.
items.reward_summary: During the Promotion Periods, trade Velvet (VELVET) in your Binance Wallet (Keyless) or via Binance Alpha to receive exclusive token rewards. For each Promotion Period , the top 3,370 users by purchase volume of VELVET tokens will share 1,314,300 VELVET tokens equally , with each eligible user receiving 390 VELVET tokens .
reasons: 未发现明显大资金门槛
items.low_barrier_reason: 未发现明显大资金门槛

items.title: Introducing Midnight (NIGHT): Grab a Share of the 90,000,000 NIGHT Token Voucher Prize Pool!
items.participation_condition: Eligible users will have a chance to share a total prize pool of 90,000,000 NIGHT in token vouchers !  Promotion Period: 2026-03-13 09:00 (UTC) to 2026-04-03 09:00 (UTC) Join Now All User Trade Mission: Trade to Share Up to 18,000,000 NIGHT Eligibility:  All verified regular users and all Binance VIP users can participate. Eligible pairs: NIGHT/USDT, NIGHT/USDC How to Participate: Click the [Join Now] button on the landing page to register.
items.reward_summary: Eligible users will have a chance to share a total prize pool of 90,000,000 NIGHT in token vouchers !  Promotion Period: 2026-03-13 09:00 (UTC) to 2026-04-03 09:00 (UTC) Join Now All User Trade Mission: Trade to Share Up to 18,000,000 NIGHT Eligibility:  All verified regular users and all Binance VIP users can participate. Trade a cumulative amount of at least 500 USD equivalent in any of the aforementioned eligible NIGHT pairs on Binance Spot during the Promotion Period to earn a randomly generated reward of between 40 and 240 NIGHT in token vouchers, limited to the first 150,000 users.
reasons: 需要完成指定参与动作
存在地区或资格限制；需要额外持仓或资格
存在额外资格或高复杂度要求
items.low_barrier_reason: 存在额外资格或高复杂度要求
